title: Migrate boolean feature flags to per-user staged rollout across modules
task: Feature flags in src/flags.js are stored as a rollout percentage (0-100) but isEnabled() treats any non-zero flag as on for everyone, defeating staged rollout. Make isEnabled(flagName, userId) honor the documented contract (0%=off for all, 100%=on for all, otherwise on when bucketOf(userId) < percent, unknown flags off). Then update every caller (src/checkout.js, src/search.js, src/theme.js) so the user is actually threaded into the flag check. `npm test` must fully pass. Do NOT modify anything under test/.

checks.pattern: themeFor splits users for the 50% dark-mode flag

notes: Multi-file refactor: fixing only isEnabled leaves the callers dropping the user (caller checks fail); fixing only callers leaves the 50% split wrong (npm test fails). A complete fix is required for all checks to pass. The themeFor split test is the discriminating assertion.
